name: Roasted Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Slice off approximately 1 inch from the top of a head of garlic, exposing each clove slightly.
3. Place the garlic on a square of aluminum foil and drizzle with olive oil.
4. Roast in the oven for 20-30 minutes, or until the garlic is very tender and soft.
5. Serve as a spread with French bread or mash up and stir into your favorite sauce.
Yield: 2 servings on bread
